TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Chenggong, title = Chenggong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chenggong} }

S.FORM: == Chenggong == u sulit nu Hulam: śąźŚäüťéģ u sulit nu Lipun: śąźŚäüťéģ u sulit nu Amilika: Chenggong Township u siwkay nu Chenggong Chenggong a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 143.53 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 65.53 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 1.94 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 11,992 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 4,552 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,208 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 60%(Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. Taitung sa , u kamu nu Sakizaya sa u Pusung. u Pangcah a kakitizaan tuud ku Pangcah a tademaw itini, yadah ku Pangcah a niyazu' itini, tabaki tu ku niyazu. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini, caayhen pasumad tu ngangan nu Sakizaya, mananamtu kuheni tu Pangcah. nikasakuwakuwan Chenggong mala 8 a cuwen atu 14 ku niyazu'. kina 14 a niyazu' sa, Ciliksay , Torik , Sa'aniwan , Kalahaay , Kahciday , Madawdaw , Dadowacen , Folalacay , Cirarokohay , Tomiyac , Piyoxo , Mararo'ong , Pisirian , Paongaongan . Madawdaw a kenis śąźŚäüťéģ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:MadawdawÔľõŚģĘŚģ∂Ť©Ī:SŠĻ≥ŐÄn-k√Ľng-chŠĻ≥ŐĀnÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:S√ģng-kong-t√¨n) . Madawdaw a kenis "A-mis a kamu, Madawdaw, ngaynga a kamu SŠĻ≥ŐÄn-k√Ľng-chŠĻ≥ŐĀn, Taywan a kamu, S√ģng-kong-t√¨n" nu Taywan Pusung a kuwan, tini i Pusung a kuwan nuwalian nuwamisan, nuwamisan mitules tu kakacawan a kenis, nuwalian micapi tu walibayu, nutimulan atu satipan silaed tu sadipasan a buyu' atu Fafokod a kenis malabelaw, satipan nuwamisa u Kalingku kunpo a kenis, masatanaya' ku liwliw, nu Pusung a kuwan satanaya'ay a sadipasan, hamin a kenis u hekal izaw ku 144 pin-bang-kung-li, u hamin nu kanatal a hekal u saka sepat tabakiay a kenus, nuwalian lekecuay adidi'ay a sadipasan a enal, satipan u sadipasan buyu'a buyu' a kakitizaan. tiniay u A-mis ku kamu. . zayhan walibayu bayu izaw ku tabakiaya a liked micaliway, sisa u mibutingay yadeh ku nilaculan, nu Kalingku sadipasan u satabakiay kasaupuan nialaan a buting, uyza mibutingay mabuwah kunipalahad, uyza sa u Madawdaw a kenis mala nu Posong a kuwan labuu saayaway tabakiay a kenis, zayhan hekal a kakitizaan u sakapahay, mala u saupuan nu caculilan nu Pusung a kuwan. kasumad nu lalay Madawdaw a kenis malumanay a ngangan " Ma-law-lu" zikuzan pangangan han tu " Singko" , zikuzan nu ngangnayaw malingatu pasumad tu ngangan "Madawdaw" han, nu nuwalian u satabakiay nu pibutingan a minatu. pakayniay Ma-law-low a ngangan u lalengatan caay kalecad ku kamu, nika katukuh kahulaman tu sazikuzay tu a mihcaan tini izaw tu ku A-mis a tademawan mananel atu pikalukan a kakitizaan, min-kou tulu a bataan izaw ku sepat a mihcaan tu saayaway zikuzan nu ngangayawan hawsa, uyza hamin nu kanatal " "Singko" a pangangan tu kenis pulung izaw ku tulu a kakitizaan, u cenbu a caay kalawlaw, pasakamu mipasuma pasuma tu ngnangan. uynian a kenis singanganay a tademaw u sakakaay mikawaway tu cebu hicasa u Singko a kawaw mahiza u An-pin a minatu, piazih tu Singko lalekalan palahad a lalekalan nuwamisan a likut tu Cin-kwng-aw, u Madawdaw, Cini-kwang Singko tuluay nu Tawwan micapi tu ngiha nu layak a kamu, zahked tu ku nipangangan tu Madawdaw a kenis katukuh ayza. hekal a lala'ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ namalilid nu penkuway, uyza u Madawdaw a kenis malalimuwa' ku liwliw, malikaku',. nutimulan saamisan tanaya' likecu', nuwalian micapi tu walibayu, satipan talakaw ku macebed ku buyu' mitulin mutuseng tu sadipasan a byu', u lala' psawali matukinih, hamin nu buyu' a lala atu a puyu'ay a buyu'. sadipasa a enal adidi' likecu, uyza dada' Madawdaw ku saahebalal, nu Kalingku a sadipasn tulu ku tabakiay bayu lekad. Madawdaw capiay masakululay a buyu' nu Singkuay masakululay a buyu', angangan a buyu' izaw ku Pisirian a buyu', Singko a buyu', Cilinkesay a buyu' satalakaway a buyu' u Singko a buyu' " katalakaw 1682m" u satalakaway nu sadipasay a buyu'. nuwalian sadipasan a kakitian i liwliwan izaw ku sadipasan atu buyu'an tusa ku kakitizaan. . sadipasan makakilac, izaw ku malingangu'ay a bayu, madicemay a ba'tu, likenlikenan a bayu,, tepad a bayu , izaw henay ku sadipasan masatukalay a lala', tiu'y buhang, masapucu'ay a sansanguan atu masapucu'ay a ba'tu micidekay a azihan a liwliw, labu nu kenis u singanganay nu layanay a azihan a kakitizaan u Nawalian atu Aw'awan. buyu'an , izaw ku lalaan, sadipasan masakululay a buyu'an talakaw ateka' satungduday ba'tu a buyu', nuwalian yadah ku lamalay buyu' a ba'tu a lala'tabakiay kibetulay malaslasay a ba'tu makutaay a satunduh, masa apuyu'ay dihkuay a buyu'an. Mdawdaw tungusy u caledesay kabalian a demaad, u demiad caledes tunu udad sa, yadah ku liked nu sauwac nika malikid ku nanum a puyu' a culil, caay ka hapinang ku kayadeh nu nanum, satipan a sadipasan a buyu' pasayza i nuwalian micumuntu tu walibabu'. paymihcaan kayadah nu udad 2,100 kung-li, palalecad tu akuti' 23,8 pasintu. kahenuln a nipalumaan izaw ku mami atu niacakan a buting. tademaw Madawdaw a kenis u tademaw pakala tu 1,36 mang ku tademaw, i Pusungay a tademaw sakatulu a katuuday nu pikawawan a kakitizaan, uyni dada' i Pusung a tuse, Puyuma a kenis zuma a ka katuud nu tademaw pakala tu 95 dada' ku tademaw /km¬≤ , i hamin nu kanatal hamin a kenisan, u katuud nu tademaw pasazikuzan miasip u saka tulu, uyni dada' ku talakaway tu Kalingku akuwan Cingaloan a kenis, Poseko a kenis. kakitizian a niyazu' Cin-kuw-aw i ayaw nu 1920 a mihcaan nu tiniay a kakitizaan u kasaupuan mikawaw tu kawaw nu hitay, 1920 a mihcaan hawsa kasaupuan nu sakikalisiw maniyul mabulaw tayza i Singko, Cin-kuw-aw adidi' aca panganga han tu Folalacay. Cinkuwangaw Cinkuwngaw izaw ku lahaday sangangu' a minatu, nu hekal a kasahini, i ayaw a mihcaan u Kalingku, puyuma " ayzaay a posong" likut nu tusaay a minatu, u sakahenulan sacumud nu minatu, tini i A-mis kananelan a niyazu' laed nu kananelan nu Pin-pu-cu a niyazu', izaw ku iciba lihalay, Layak a tademaw mikawaway tu patumaliway atu tiniay mananel, mala u tiniay cacayay nu kananelan nu Layakay a niyazu'. Singku Singku a kenis palahad i 1920 a mihcaan u sakahenulan a mihcaan, saayaw izaw ku tabakiay a balunga' pasasa, pasayzaan i Posong a zazan malepun tu, 1921 a mihcaan u pisakawan nu cenbu malimad tayza i Singku, 1922 a mihcaan malingatu kakilul a misang' tu cilis pasilsilan nu nanum, sapananu pisilsilan nu nanum a kawaw, lekakawa tu zazan, Singku pisakawan nu cenbu a kakitizaan tuse lekakawa a kawaw, u Singku mala u sadipasan kasaupuan nu pikawawan nu cenbu, misiwbanay tu tuud. Madawdaw nu mibutingay a minatu malepun tu ku pisanga' u Singku a kenis kalamkam kunikalahad, pitinamay a lamangan atu nilaculan papulung tu kayadah mahapinang kunikacunus. zikuzan nu ngangayaw Singku a kenis u palahad i 1922 a mihcaan Singku a kenis palalecad tu lekakawa. kakenis pikuwanan tu kanatal 1946 a mihcaan pikuwanan nu cenbu a kakitizaan ngangnan u Posong a kuwan Singko a kakitizaan Singko a kenis, itawya u Posong a kuwan i labu uyza dada' Pusung cacayay a kenis sakawawan nu cebu akakitizaan, Lilong atu Singko nu kenisay a sakawawan nu cebu a kakitizaan, tatenga' atu palahad a kawaw caay ka lecad, uyni a kakitizaan cebu a sakuwan pasumad han tu kenis, zayhan u Singko atu Cang-huw, Cya-i labu nu tusaay a kuwan malecad tu Singko a ngangan, maleku ku nipasumad Singko a ngangan, mala u Singko kenis tu. minatu Madawdaw pibutingnan a minatu, singangan aca tu Singko pibutingay a minatu, Kakawasan a minatu nu Taywan a sadipasan macapiay nu mibutingay kahenulan kakitizaan, u saka tusa lekad pibutingan a minatu, nu bayuay nialaan a lami' maacakay a buting a singangan. adidi'ay minatu nu mibutingay Ci-huy mibutingay a minatu.
S.PHON: == ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: *** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: *** u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika: ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč townsńßip u siwkaj nu ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° ¶ańß a kakitizaan tuud ku paŇč ¶ańß a tad…ômaw itini, jadańß ku paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° itini, tabaki tu ku nijazu. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini, ¶aajńß…ôn pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶ńß**n****:s*Ňč-koŇč-t*n) . madawdaw a k…ônis "a-mis a kamu, madawdaw, ŇčajŇča a kamu s**n-k*Ňč- ¶ńß**n, tajwan a kamu, s*Ňč-koŇč-t*n" nu tajwan pusuŇč a kuwan, tini i pusuŇč a kuwan nuwar~…ĺian nuwamisan, nuwamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu kaka ¶awan a k…ônis, nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, nutimur~…ĺan atu satipan sir~…ĺa…ôd tu sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° atu fafokod a k…ônis mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw, satipan kanatar~…ĺ a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u saka s…ôpat tabakiaj a k…ônus, nuwar~…ĺian r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶uaj adidi Ē~ °aj a sadipasan a …ônar~…ĺ, satipan u sadipasan buju Ē~ °a buju Ē~ ° a kakitizaan. tiniaj u a-mis ku kamu. . zajńßan war~…ĺibaju baju izaw ku tabakiaja a r~…ĺik…ôd mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj, sisa u mibutiŇčaj jad…ôńß ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku sadipasan u satabakiaj kasaupuan niar~…ĺaan a butiŇč, ujza mibutiŇčaj mabuwańß kunipar~…ĺańßad, ujza sa u madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺa nu posoŇč a kuwan r~…ĺabuu saajawaj tabakiaj a k…ônis, zajńßan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kakitizaan u sakapańßaj, mar~…ĺa u saupuan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu pusuŇč a kuwan. kasumad nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan " ma-r~…ĺaw-r~…ĺu" zikuzan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " siŇčko" , zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčnajaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasumad tu sazikuzaj tu a mińß ¶aan tini izaw tu ku a-mis a tad…ômawan manan…ôr~…ĺ atu pikar~…ĺukan a kakitizaan, min-kou tur~…ĺu a bataan izaw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčajawan ńßawsa, tad…ômaw u sakakaaj mikawawaj tu ¶…ôbu ńßi ¶asa u siŇčko a kawaw mańßiza u an-pin a minatu, piazińß tu siŇčko r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan par~…ĺańßad a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nuwamisan a r~…ĺikut tu ¶in-kwŇč-aw, u madawdaw, ¶ini-kwaŇč siŇčko tur~…ĺuaj nu tawwan mi ¶api tu Ňčińßa nu r~…ĺajak a kamu, zańßk…ôd tu ku nipaŇčaŇčan tu madawdaw a k…ônis katukuńß ajza. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °**** namar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu p…ônkuwaj, ujza u madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺar~…ĺimuwa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, mar~…ĺikaku Ē~ °,. nutimur~…ĺan saamisan tanaja Ē~ ° r~…ĺik…ô ¶u Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, satipan tar~…ĺakaw ku ma ¶…ôb…ôd ku buju Ē~ ° mitur~…ĺin mutus…ôŇč tu sadipasan a bju Ē~ °, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° psawar~…ĺi matukinińß, ńßamin nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa atu a puju Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °. sadipasa a …ônar~…ĺ adidi Ē~ ° r~…ĺik…ô ¶u, ujza dada Ē~ ° madawdaw ku saańß…ôbar~…ĺar~…ĺ, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a sadipasn tur~…ĺu ku tabakiaj baju r~…ĺ…ôkad. madawdaw ¶apiaj masakur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ ° nu siŇčkuaj masakur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °, aŇčaŇčan a buju Ē~ ° izaw ku pisirian a buju Ē~ °, siŇčko a buju Ē~ °, ¶ir~…ĺink…ôsaj a buju Ē~ ° satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° u siŇčko a buju Ē~ ° " katar~…ĺakaw ****m" u satar~…ĺakawaj nu sadipasaj a buju Ē~ °. nuwar~…ĺian sadipasan a kakitian i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan izaw ku sadipasan atu buju Ē~ °an tusa ku kakitizaan. . sadipasan makakir~…ĺa ¶, izaw ku mar~…ĺiŇčaŇču Ē~ °aj a baju, madi ¶…ômaj a ba Ē~ °tu, r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan a baju,, t…ôpad a baju , izaw ńß…ônaj ku sadipasan masatukar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, tiu Ē~ °j buńßaŇč, masapu ¶u Ē~ °aj a sansaŇčuan atu masapu ¶u Ē~ °aj a ba Ē~ °tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a azińßan a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis u siŇčaŇčanaj nu r~…ĺajanaj a azińßan a kakitizaan u nawar~…ĺian atu aw Ē~ °awan. buju Ē~ °an , izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, sadipasan masakur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °an tar~…ĺakaw at…ôka Ē~ ° satuŇčdudaj ba Ē~ °tu a buju Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian jadańß ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj buju Ē~ ° a ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °tabakiaj kib…ôtur~…ĺaj mar~…ĺasr~…ĺasaj a ba Ē~ °tu makutaaj a satunduńß, masa apuju Ē~ °aj dińßkuaj a buju Ē~ °an. mdawdaw tuŇčusj u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj kabar~…ĺian a d…ômaad, u d…ômiad ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs tunu udad sa, jadańß ku r~…ĺik…ôd nu sauwa ¶ nika mar~…ĺikid ku nanum a puju Ē~ ° a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj ka ńßapinaŇč ku kajad…ôńß nu nanum, satipan a sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° pasajza i nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶umuntu tu war~…ĺibabu Ē~ °. pajmińß ¶aan kajadańß nu udad *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu akuti Ē~ ° **,* pasintu. kańß…ônur~…ĺn a nipar~…ĺumaan izaw ku mami atu nia ¶akan a butiŇč. tad…ômaw madawdaw a k…ônis u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *,** maŇč ku tad…ômaw, i pusuŇčaj a tad…ômaw sakatur~…ĺu a katuudaj nu pikawawan a kakitizaan, ujni dada Ē~ ° i pusuŇč a tus…ô, pujuma a k…ônis zuma a ka katuud nu tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ** dada Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw /km* , i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ńßamin a k…ônisan, u katuud nu tad…ômaw pasazikuzan miasip u saka tur~…ĺu, ujni dada Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺakawaj tu kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan ¶iŇčar~…ĺoan a k…ônis, pos…ôko a k…ônis. kakitizian a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶in-kuw-aw i ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan nu tiniaj a kakitizaan u kasaupuan mikawaw tu kawaw nu ńßitaj, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa kasaupuan nu sakikar~…ĺisiw manijur~…ĺ mabur~…ĺaw tajza i siŇčko, ¶in-kuw-aw adidi Ē~ ° a ¶a paŇčaŇča ńßan tu for~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶aj. ¶inkuwaŇčaw ¶inkuwŇčaw izaw ku r~…ĺańßadaj saŇčaŇču Ē~ ° a minatu, nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kasańßini, i ajaw a mińß ¶aan u kar~…ĺiŇčku, pujuma " ajzaaj a posoŇč" r~…ĺikut nu tusaaj a minatu, u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan sa ¶umud nu minatu, tini i a-mis kanan…ôr~…ĺan a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺa…ôd nu kanan…ôr~…ĺan nu pin-pu- ¶u a nijazu Ē~ °, izaw ku i ¶iba r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺajak a tad…ômaw mikawawaj tu patumar~…ĺiwaj atu tiniaj manan…ôr~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa u tiniaj ¶a ¶ajaj nu kanan…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajakaj a nijazu Ē~ °. siŇčku siŇčku a k…ônis par~…ĺańßad i **** a mińß ¶aan u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan a mińß ¶aan, saajaw izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° pasasa, pasajzaan i posoŇč a zazan mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu, **** a mińß ¶aan u pisakawan nu ¶…ônbu mar~…ĺimad tajza i siŇčku, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ a misaŇč Ē~ ° tu ¶ir~…ĺis pasir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum, sapananu pisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum a kawaw, r~…ĺ…ôkakawa tu zazan, siŇčku pisakawan nu ¶…ônbu a kakitizaan tus…ô r~…ĺ…ôkakawa a kawaw, u siŇčku mar~…ĺa u sadipasan kasaupuan nu pikawawan nu ¶…ônbu, misiwbanaj tu tuud. madawdaw nu mibutiŇčaj a minatu mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu ku pisaŇča Ē~ ° u siŇčku a k…ônis kar~…ĺamkam kunikar~…ĺańßad, pitinamaj a r~…ĺamaŇčan atu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan papur~…ĺuŇč tu kajadańß mańßapinaŇč kunika ¶unus. zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčajaw siŇčku a k…ônis u par~…ĺańßad i **** a mińß ¶aan siŇčku a k…ônis par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu r~…ĺ…ôkakawa. kak…ônis pikuwanan tu kanatar~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan pikuwanan nu ¶…ônbu a kakitizaan ŇčaŇčnan u posoŇč a kuwan siŇčko a kakitizaan siŇčko a k…ônis, itawja u posoŇč a kuwan i r~…ĺabu ujza dada Ē~ ° pusuŇč ¶a ¶ajaj a k…ônis sakawawan nu ¶…ôbu akakitizaan, r~…ĺir~…ĺoŇč atu siŇčko nu k…ônisaj a sakawawan nu ¶…ôbu a kakitizaan, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu par~…ĺańßad a kawaw ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ujni a kakitizaan ¶…ôbu a sakuwan pasumad ńßan tu k…ônis, zajńßan u siŇčko atu ¶aŇč-ńßuw, ¶ja-i r~…ĺabu nu tusaaj a kuwan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu siŇčko a ŇčaŇčan, mar~…ĺ…ôku ku nipasumad siŇčko a ŇčaŇčan, mar~…ĺa u siŇčko k…ônis tu. minatu madawdaw pibutiŇčnan a minatu, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu siŇčko pibutiŇčaj a minatu, kakawasan a minatu nu tajwan a sadipasan ma ¶apiaj nu mibutiŇčaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan kakitizaan, u saka tusa r~…ĺ…ôkad pibutiŇčan a minatu, nu bajuaj niar~…ĺaan a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° maa ¶akaj a butiŇč a siŇčaŇčan. adidi Ē~ °aj minatu nu mibutiŇčaj ¶i-ńßuj mibutiŇčaj a minatu.
S.FORM: == Chenggong == u sulit nu Hulam: śąźŚäüťéģ u sulit nu Lipun: śąźŚäüťéģ u sulit nu Amilika: Chenggong Township u siwkay nu Chenggong Chenggong a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 143.53 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 65.53 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 1.94 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 11,992 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 4,552 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,208 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 60%(Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. Taitung sa , u kamu nu Sakizaya sa u Pusung. u Pangcah a kakitizaan tuud ku Pangcah a tademaw itini, yadah ku Pangcah a niyazu' itini, tabaki tu ku niyazu. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini, caayhen pasumad tu ngangan nu Sakizaya, mananamtu kuheni tu Pangcah. nikasakuwakuwan Chenggong mala 8 a cuwen atu 14 ku niyazu'. kina 14 a niyazu' sa, Ciliksay , Torik , Sa'aniwan , Kalahaay , Kahciday , Madawdaw , Dadowacen , Folalacay , Cirarokohay , Tomiyac , Piyoxo , Mararo'ong , Pisirian , Paongaongan . Madawdaw a kenis śąźŚäüťéģ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:MadawdawÔľõŚģĘŚģ∂Ť©Ī:SŠĻ≥ŐÄn-k√Ľng-chŠĻ≥ŐĀnÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:S√ģng-kong-t√¨n) . Madawdaw a kenis "A-mis a kamu, Madawdaw, ngaynga a kamu SŠĻ≥ŐÄn-k√Ľng-chŠĻ≥ŐĀn, Taywan a kamu, S√ģng-kong-t√¨n" nu Taywan Pusung a kuwan, tini i Pusung a kuwan nuwalian nuwamisan, nuwamisan mitules tu kakacawan a kenis, nuwalian micapi tu walibayu, nutimulan atu satipan silaed tu sadipasan a buyu' atu Fafokod a kenis malabelaw, satipan nuwamisa u Kalingku kunpo a kenis, masatanaya' ku liwliw, nu Pusung a kuwan satanaya'ay a sadipasan, hamin a kenis u hekal izaw ku 144 pin-bang-kung-li, u hamin nu kanatal a hekal u saka sepat tabakiay a kenus, nuwalian lekecuay adidi'ay a sadipasan a enal, satipan u sadipasan buyu'a buyu' a kakitizaan. tiniay u A-mis ku kamu. . zayhan walibayu bayu izaw ku tabakiaya a liked micaliway, sisa u mibutingay yadeh ku nilaculan, nu Kalingku sadipasan u satabakiay kasaupuan nialaan a buting, uyza mibutingay mabuwah kunipalahad, uyza sa u Madawdaw a kenis mala nu Posong a kuwan labuu saayaway tabakiay a kenis, zayhan hekal a kakitizaan u sakapahay, mala u saupuan nu caculilan nu Pusung a kuwan. kasumad nu lalay Madawdaw a kenis malumanay a ngangan " Ma-law-lu" zikuzan pangangan han tu " Singko" , zikuzan nu ngangnayaw malingatu pasumad tu ngangan "Madawdaw" han, nu nuwalian u satabakiay nu pibutingan a minatu. pakayniay Ma-law-low a ngangan u lalengatan caay kalecad ku kamu, nika katukuh kahulaman tu sazikuzay tu a mihcaan tini izaw tu ku A-mis a tademawan mananel atu pikalukan a kakitizaan, min-kou tulu a bataan izaw ku sepat a mihcaan tu saayaway zikuzan nu ngangayawan hawsa, uyza hamin nu kanatal " "Singko" a pangangan tu kenis pulung izaw ku tulu a kakitizaan, u cenbu a caay kalawlaw, pasakamu mipasuma pasuma tu ngnangan. uynian a kenis singanganay a tademaw u sakakaay mikawaway tu cebu hicasa u Singko a kawaw mahiza u An-pin a minatu, piazih tu Singko lalekalan palahad a lalekalan nuwamisan a likut tu Cin-kwng-aw, u Madawdaw, Cini-kwang Singko tuluay nu Tawwan micapi tu ngiha nu layak a kamu, zahked tu ku nipangangan tu Madawdaw a kenis katukuh ayza. hekal a lala'ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ namalilid nu penkuway, uyza u Madawdaw a kenis malalimuwa' ku liwliw, malikaku',. nutimulan saamisan tanaya' likecu', nuwalian micapi tu walibayu, satipan talakaw ku macebed ku buyu' mitulin mutuseng tu sadipasan a byu', u lala' psawali matukinih, hamin nu buyu' a lala atu a puyu'ay a buyu'. sadipasa a enal adidi' likecu, uyza dada' Madawdaw ku saahebalal, nu Kalingku a sadipasn tulu ku tabakiay bayu lekad. Madawdaw capiay masakululay a buyu' nu Singkuay masakululay a buyu', angangan a buyu' izaw ku Pisirian a buyu', Singko a buyu', Cilinkesay a buyu' satalakaway a buyu' u Singko a buyu' " katalakaw 1682m" u satalakaway nu sadipasay a buyu'. nuwalian sadipasan a kakitian i liwliwan izaw ku sadipasan atu buyu'an tusa ku kakitizaan. . sadipasan makakilac, izaw ku malingangu'ay a bayu, madicemay a ba'tu, likenlikenan a bayu,, tepad a bayu , izaw henay ku sadipasan masatukalay a lala', tiu'y buhang, masapucu'ay a sansanguan atu masapucu'ay a ba'tu micidekay a azihan a liwliw, labu nu kenis u singanganay nu layanay a azihan a kakitizaan u Nawalian atu Aw'awan. buyu'an , izaw ku lalaan, sadipasan masakululay a buyu'an talakaw ateka' satungduday ba'tu a buyu', nuwalian yadah ku lamalay buyu' a ba'tu a lala'tabakiay kibetulay malaslasay a ba'tu makutaay a satunduh, masa apuyu'ay dihkuay a buyu'an. Mdawdaw tungusy u caledesay kabalian a demaad, u demiad caledes tunu udad sa, yadah ku liked nu sauwac nika malikid ku nanum a puyu' a culil, caay ka hapinang ku kayadeh nu nanum, satipan a sadipasan a buyu' pasayza i nuwalian micumuntu tu walibabu'. paymihcaan kayadah nu udad 2,100 kung-li, palalecad tu akuti' 23,8 pasintu. kahenuln a nipalumaan izaw ku mami atu niacakan a buting. tademaw Madawdaw a kenis u tademaw pakala tu 1,36 mang ku tademaw, i Pusungay a tademaw sakatulu a katuuday nu pikawawan a kakitizaan, uyni dada' i Pusung a tuse, Puyuma a kenis zuma a ka katuud nu tademaw pakala tu 95 dada' ku tademaw /km¬≤ , i hamin nu kanatal hamin a kenisan, u katuud nu tademaw pasazikuzan miasip u saka tulu, uyni dada' ku talakaway tu Kalingku akuwan Cingaloan a kenis, Poseko a kenis. kakitizian a niyazu' Cin-kuw-aw i ayaw nu 1920 a mihcaan nu tiniay a kakitizaan u kasaupuan mikawaw tu kawaw nu hitay, 1920 a mihcaan hawsa kasaupuan nu sakikalisiw maniyul mabulaw tayza i Singko, Cin-kuw-aw adidi' aca panganga han tu Folalacay. Cinkuwangaw Cinkuwngaw izaw ku lahaday sangangu' a minatu, nu hekal a kasahini, i ayaw a mihcaan u Kalingku, puyuma " ayzaay a posong" likut nu tusaay a minatu, u sakahenulan sacumud nu minatu, tini i A-mis kananelan a niyazu' laed nu kananelan nu Pin-pu-cu a niyazu', izaw ku iciba lihalay, Layak a tademaw mikawaway tu patumaliway atu tiniay mananel, mala u tiniay cacayay nu kananelan nu Layakay a niyazu'. Singku Singku a kenis palahad i 1920 a mihcaan u sakahenulan a mihcaan, saayaw izaw ku tabakiay a balunga' pasasa, pasayzaan i Posong a zazan malepun tu, 1921 a mihcaan u pisakawan nu cenbu malimad tayza i Singku, 1922 a mihcaan malingatu kakilul a misang' tu cilis pasilsilan nu nanum, sapananu pisilsilan nu nanum a kawaw, lekakawa tu zazan, Singku pisakawan nu cenbu a kakitizaan tuse lekakawa a kawaw, u Singku mala u sadipasan kasaupuan nu pikawawan nu cenbu, misiwbanay tu tuud. Madawdaw nu mibutingay a minatu malepun tu ku pisanga' u Singku a kenis kalamkam kunikalahad, pitinamay a lamangan atu nilaculan papulung tu kayadah mahapinang kunikacunus. zikuzan nu ngangayaw Singku a kenis u palahad i 1922 a mihcaan Singku a kenis palalecad tu lekakawa. kakenis pikuwanan tu kanatal 1946 a mihcaan pikuwanan nu cenbu a kakitizaan ngangnan u Posong a kuwan Singko a kakitizaan Singko a kenis, itawya u Posong a kuwan i labu uyza dada' Pusung cacayay a kenis sakawawan nu cebu akakitizaan, Lilong atu Singko nu kenisay a sakawawan nu cebu a kakitizaan, tatenga' atu palahad a kawaw caay ka lecad, uyni a kakitizaan cebu a sakuwan pasumad han tu kenis, zayhan u Singko atu Cang-huw, Cya-i labu nu tusaay a kuwan malecad tu Singko a ngangan, maleku ku nipasumad Singko a ngangan, mala u Singko kenis tu. minatu Madawdaw pibutingnan a minatu, singangan aca tu Singko pibutingay a minatu, Kakawasan a minatu nu Taywan a sadipasan macapiay nu mibutingay kahenulan kakitizaan, u saka tusa lekad pibutingan a minatu, nu bayuay nialaan a lami' maacakay a buting a singangan. adidi'ay minatu nu mibutingay Ci-huy mibutingay a minatu.
S.PHON: == ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: *** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: *** u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika: ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč townsńßip u siwkaj nu ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paŇč ¶ańß ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. taituŇč sa , u kamu nu sakizaja sa u pusuŇč. u paŇč ¶ańß a kakitizaan tuud ku paŇč ¶ańß a tad…ômaw itini, jadańß ku paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° itini, tabaki tu ku nijazu. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini, ¶aajńß…ôn pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja, mananamtu kuńß…ôni tu paŇč ¶ańß. nikasakuwakuwan ¶ńß…ôŇčgoŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ¶ir~…ĺiksaj , torik , sa Ē~ °aniwan , kar~…ĺańßaaj , kańß ¶idaj , madawdaw , dadowa ¶…ôn , for~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶aj , ¶irarokońßaj , tomija ¶ , pijo*o , mararo Ē~ °oŇč , pisirian , paoŇčaoŇčan . madawdaw a k…ônis ***(***:madawdaw****:s**n-k*Ňč- ¶ńß**n****:s*Ňč-koŇč-t*n) . madawdaw a k…ônis "a-mis a kamu, madawdaw, ŇčajŇča a kamu s**n-k*Ňč- ¶ńß**n, tajwan a kamu, s*Ňč-koŇč-t*n" nu tajwan pusuŇč a kuwan, tini i pusuŇč a kuwan nuwar~…ĺian nuwamisan, nuwamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu kaka ¶awan a k…ônis, nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, nutimur~…ĺan atu satipan sir~…ĺa…ôd tu sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° atu fafokod a k…ônis mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw, satipan kanatar~…ĺ a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u saka s…ôpat tabakiaj a k…ônus, nuwar~…ĺian r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶uaj adidi Ē~ °aj a sadipasan a …ônar~…ĺ, satipan u sadipasan buju Ē~ °a buju Ē~ ° a kakitizaan. tiniaj u a-mis ku kamu. . zajńßan war~…ĺibaju baju izaw ku tabakiaja a r~…ĺik…ôd mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj, sisa u mibutiŇčaj jad…ôńß ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku sadipasan u satabakiaj kasaupuan niar~…ĺaan a butiŇč, ujza mibutiŇčaj mabuwańß kunipar~…ĺańßad, ujza sa u madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺa nu posoŇč a kuwan r~…ĺabuu saajawaj tabakiaj a k…ônis, zajńßan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kakitizaan u sakapańßaj, mar~…ĺa u saupuan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu pusuŇč a kuwan. kasumad nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan " ma-r~…ĺaw-r~…ĺu" zikuzan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " siŇčko" , zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčnajaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasumad tu nu p…ônkuwaj, ujza u madawdaw a k…ônis mar~…ĺar~…ĺimuwa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, mar~…ĺikaku Ē~ °,. nutimur~…ĺan saamisan tanaja Ē~ ° r~…ĺik…ô ¶u Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, satipan satar~…ĺakawaj nu sadipasaj a buju Ē~ °. nuwar~…ĺian sadipasan a kakitian i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan izaw ku sadipasan atu buju Ē~ °an tusa ku kakitizaan. . sadipasan makakir~…ĺa ¶, izaw ku mar~…ĺiŇčaŇču Ē~ °aj ¶u Ē~ °aj a ba Ē~ °tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a azińßan a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis u siŇčaŇčanaj nu r~…ĺajanaj a azińßan a kakitizaan u nawar~…ĺian atu aw Ē~ °awan. buju Ē~ °an , izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, sadipasan masakur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °an tar~…ĺakaw at…ôka Ē~ ° satuŇčdudaj ba Ē~ °tu a buju Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian jadańß ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj buju Ē~ ° a ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °tabakiaj kib…ôtur~…ĺaj mar~…ĺasr~…ĺasaj a ba Ē~ °tu makutaaj a satunduńß, masa apuju Ē~ °aj dińßkuaj a buju Ē~ °an. mdawdaw tuŇčusj u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj kabar~…ĺian a d…ômaad, u d…ômiad ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs tunu udad sa, jadańß ku r~…ĺik…ôd nu sauwa ¶ nika mar~…ĺikid ku nanum a puju Ē~ ° a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj ka ńßapinaŇč ku kajad…ôńß nu nanum, satipan a sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° pasajza i nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶umuntu tu war~…ĺibabu Ē~ °. pajmińß ¶aan kajadańß nu udad *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu akuti Ē~ ° **,* pasintu. kańß…ônur~…ĺn a nipar~…ĺumaan izaw ku mami atu nia ¶akan a butiŇč. tad…ômaw madawdaw a k…ônis u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *,** maŇč ku tad…ômaw, i pusuŇčaj a tad…ômaw sakatur~…ĺu a katuudaj nu pikawawan a kakitizaan, ujni dada Ē~ ° i pusuŇč a tus…ô, pujuma a k…ônis zuma a ka katuud nu tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ** dada Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw /km* , i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ńßamin a k…ônisan, u katuud nu tad…ômaw pasazikuzan miasip u saka tur~…ĺu, ujni dada Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺakawaj tu kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan ¶iŇčar~…ĺoan a k…ônis, pos…ôko a k…ônis. kakitizian a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶in-kuw-aw i ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan nu tiniaj a kakitizaan u kasaupuan mikawaw tu kawaw nu ńßitaj, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa kasaupuan nu sakikar~…ĺisiw manijur~…ĺ mabur~…ĺaw tajza i siŇčko, ¶in-kuw-aw adidi Ē~ ° a ¶a paŇčaŇča ńßan tu for~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶aj. ¶inkuwaŇčaw ¶inkuwŇčaw izaw ku r~…ĺańßadaj saŇčaŇču Ē~ ° a minatu, nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kasańßini, i ajaw a mińß ¶aan u kar~…ĺiŇčku, pujuma " ajzaaj a posoŇč" r~…ĺikut nu tusaaj a minatu, u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan sa ¶umud nu minatu, tini i a-mis kanan…ôr~…ĺan a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺa…ôd nu kanan…ôr~…ĺan nu pin-pu- ¶u a nijazu Ē~ °, izaw ku i ¶iba r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺajak a tad…ômaw mikawawaj tu patumar~…ĺiwaj atu tiniaj manan…ôr~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa u tiniaj ¶a ¶ajaj nu kanan…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajakaj a nijazu Ē~ °. siŇčku siŇčku a k…ônis par~…ĺańßad i **** a mińß ¶aan u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan a mińß ¶aan, saajaw izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° pasasa, pasajzaan i posoŇč a zazan mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu, **** a mińß ¶aan u pisakawan nu ¶…ônbu mar~…ĺimad tajza i siŇčku, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ a misaŇč Ē~ ° tu ¶ir~…ĺis pasir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum, sapananu pisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum a kawaw, r~…ĺ…ôkakawa tu zazan, siŇčku pisakawan nu ¶…ônbu a kakitizaan tus…ô r~…ĺ…ôkakawa a kawaw, u siŇčku mar~…ĺa u sadipasan kasaupuan nu pikawawan nu ¶…ônbu, misiwbanaj tu tuud. madawdaw nu mibutiŇčaj a minatu mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu ku pisaŇča Ē~ ° u siŇčku a k…ônis kar~…ĺamkam kunikar~…ĺańßad, pitinamaj a r~…ĺamaŇčan atu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan papur~…ĺuŇč tu kajadańß mańßapinaŇč kunika ¶unus. zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčajaw siŇčku a k…ônis u par~…ĺańßad i **** a mińß ¶aan siŇčku a k…ônis par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu r~…ĺ…ôkakawa. kak…ônis pikuwanan tu kanatar~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan pikuwanan nu ¶…ônbu a kakitizaan ŇčaŇčnan u posoŇč a kuwan siŇčko a kakitizaan siŇčko a k…ônis, itawja u posoŇč a kuwan i r~…ĺabu ujza dada Ē~ ° pusuŇč ¶a ¶ajaj a k…ônis sakawawan nu ¶…ôbu akakitizaan, r~…ĺir~…ĺoŇč atu siŇčko nu k…ônisaj a sakawawan nu ¶…ôbu a kakitizaan, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu par~…ĺańßad a kawaw ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ujni a kakitizaan ¶…ôbu a sakuwan pasumad ńßan tu k…ônis, zajńßan u siŇčko atu ¶aŇč-ńßuw, ¶ja-i r~…ĺabu nu tusaaj a kuwan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu siŇčko a ŇčaŇčan, mar~…ĺ…ôku ku nipasumad siŇčko a ŇčaŇčan, mar~…ĺa u siŇčko k…ônis tu. minatu madawdaw pibutiŇčnan a minatu, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu siŇčko pibutiŇčaj a minatu, kakawasan a minatu nu tajwan a sadipasan ma ¶apiaj nu mibutiŇčaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan kakitizaan, u saka tusa r~…ĺ…ôkad pibutiŇčan a minatu, nu bajuaj niar~…ĺaan a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° maa ¶akaj a butiŇč a siŇčaŇčan. adidi Ē~ °aj minatu nu mibutiŇčaj ¶i-ńßuj mibutiŇčaj a minatu.
